pages.text:
SB25-0055
A BILL FOR AN ACT
CONCERNING MODIFICATIONS TO THE COLORADO WAGE EQUITY ACT.

BY REPRESENTATIVE(S) Chen, Adams
BY SENATOR(S) Johnson, Rivera

Committee on Business Affairs & Labor

Bill Summary
The bill modifies Colorado law and creates deterministic sample
content for Project Geode parser, entity, graph, and tagging tests.

BE IT ENACTED BY THE GENERAL ASSEMBLY OF THE STATE OF COLORADO:

SECTION 1.
8-6-101, Colorado Revised Statutes, is amended to read:
(1) As used in this section:
(a) "employer" means a person, firm, partnership, association, corporation, receiver, or other officer of a court of this state that employs a person in Colorado.
(2) The director shall publish wage transparency guidance for the 2025-26 fiscal year.
(3) The House Business Affairs & Labor Committee may request annual compliance data.

SECTION 2.
8-13.5-201, Colorado Revised Statutes, is amended to read:
(1) An employer shall maintain records showing wage rates, job descriptions, and promotion opportunities.
(2) The division may issue a civil penalty of $5,000 for each willful violation of the Colorado wage equity act.

SECTION 3. Effective date.
This act takes effect upon passage.
